creator: admin@hackacad.net
text:
AWS is making a lot of chances within the minor releases, anyway,  releases should be upgradeable within the major branch. Plus, maintenance windows are only planned for major releases, so it's more rolling releases rather than maintaining minor releases.

Looking at the release schedule they are pushing new minor releases every month, so maintaining every .x release would result in dozens of 2.x ports. Portdowngrade/gitup should help if someone really needs to keep a minor version. 

We should keep that in mind for a 3.x major (textproc/opensearch3).

https://opensearch.org/releases.html#maintenance-policy
